title: Roots Ventures Healthtech Investment Thesis
summary: Authored a sector thesis across 5+ healthtech sub-sectors for an early-stage VC context.
impact: Mapped USD 100M+ opportunity and recommended 11 pre-Series A targets.
detail: Profiled 10+ late-stage investors to sharpen exit pathways and strategic fit for each thesis lane.

title: BCG Ideathon Healthtech GTM Strategy
summary: Performed diligence on Indian healthtech and built a structured go-to-market expansion recommendation.
impact: Pitched a USD 171M GTM strategy as national semi-finalist team from IIT Bombay.
detail: Designed channel architecture, demand segmentation, and operating assumptions for senior panel review.

title: RBI Monetary Policy Transmission Study
summary: Independent macro analysis of 12 RBI rate cycles from 2013 to 2025.
impact: Identified a consistent 3-4 quarter lag between policy action and real economy impact.
detail: Tracked inflation response to 250 bps tightening in FY22-FY23 with CPI easing from 7.8% to 5.7%.

title: V2G2H Bidirectional Charging Infrastructure
summary: Built Vehicle-to-Grid-to-Home architecture for Indian residential EV charging contexts.
impact: Reached finals of Global Sustainability Challenge and Innomax by Thermax.
detail: Focused on practical deployment economics, household load balancing, and grid responsiveness.

title: Sharda Motors DCF Investment Thesis
summary: Developed a DCF-led investment report for a competitive equity research setting.
impact: Framed valuation ranges and recommendation logic under competition timelines.
detail: Used sensitivity testing on margins and terminal value assumptions to stress recommendation quality.
